definition: A status label that names the visible slice of a paged collection — e.g. ‘showing 21–40 of 500’. Requires a known total, so it composes only over an offset/page resource protocol; a cursor protocol has no total and forces it off.
usage: The rangeLabel dimension of the Collection Operations Intent, surfaced by the Pagination block's withRangeLabel trait. Recommended page-size options, defaults, and how the label degrades when the total is unavailable are unverified — owned by backlog #060.
